title: Oil Prices Tumble 5% as Global Oversupply Concerns Eclipse Geopolitical Tensions
shortdescription: Brent crude retreats to $70 as US inventories swell and recession fears resurface.
description: Brent crude retreats to $70 as US inventories swell and recession fears resurface.
author: Henry Willy

title: Ilhan Omar Attacked with Unknown Substance at Minnesota Town Hall, Suspect Arrested
shortdescription: Ilhan Omar was sprayed with an unidentified substance during a Minneapolis town hall. Police arrested a suspect as concerns over political violence grow.
description: Ilhan Omar was sprayed with an unidentified substance during a Minneapolis town hall. Police arrested a suspect as concerns over political violence grow.
author: Macro Anton

title: Denmark Pushes Back on U.S. Greenland Acquisition Plans in Recent Talks
shortdescription: Trump pushes for Greenland's control to strengthen U.S. national security, sparking a diplomatic conflict with Denmark and Greenland amid international opposition.
description: Trump pushes for Greenland's control to strengthen U.S. national security, sparking a diplomatic conflict with Denmark and Greenland amid international opposition.
author: Macro Anton

title: TMC MP’s Arrested During Protests Against ED’s I-PAC Raids
shortdescription: TMC leaders, including MPs Mahua Moitra and Derek O’Brien, were arrested by Delhi police during a protest against ED raids on the I-PAC office in Kolkata.
description: TMC leaders, including MPs Mahua Moitra and Derek O’Brien, were arrested by Delhi police during a protest against ED raids on the I-PAC office in Kolkata.
author: Macro Anton

title: ISRO Investigates PSLV-C62 Anomaly After EOS-N1 Satellite Loss
shortdescription: ISRO hit a snag in its PSLV-C62 mission late in flight, resulting in the loss of the EOS-N1 satellite.
description: ISRO hit a snag in its PSLV-C62 mission late in flight, resulting in the loss of the EOS-N1 satellite.
author: Gwen John

title: Silver Tops $75/oz as Geopolitical Risks Escalate
shortdescription: Safe-haven demand and industrial use drive silver to historic highs.
description: Safe-haven demand and industrial use drive silver to historic highs.
